session_focus: Keep the bootstrap prompt aligned with the real loop, canonical sync ownership, and repo-truth shell so future agents do not rebuild stale behavior.
user_directives: Keep the bootstrap prompt aligned with the real loop, canonical sync ownership, and repo-truth shell so future agents do not rebuild stale behavior.
assistant_responses: Updated the prompt to describe canonical sync, repo-truth routing, projection state, and serialized git safety as the current system contract.
training_value: The prompt is part of the runtime contract and must evolve with the system.
Prompt sections drifted from the real runtime, which caused agents to recreate deleted surfaces and misread how task promotion worked.
